G5279.strongs_def: to remind quietly, i.e. suggest to the (middle voice, one's own) memory
G5279.kjv_def: put in mind, remember, bring to (put in) remembrance

G5240.derivation: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and the alternate form of G1632 (ἐκχέω);
G5240.strongs_def: to pour out over, i.e. (passively) to overflow

G5229.derivation: middle voice from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and G142 (αἴρω);
G5229.strongs_def: to raise oneself over, i.e. (figuratively) to become haughty
G5229.kjv_def: exalt self, be exalted above measure

G5202.derivation: from a compound of G5204 (ὕδωρ) and a derivative of G4095 (πίνω);
G5202.strongs_def: to be a water-drinker, i.e. to abstain from vinous beverages

G5215.derivation: apparently from a simpler (obsolete) form of (to celebrate;
G5215.strongs_def: probably akin to G103 (ᾄδω); compare H05667); a "hymn" or religious ode (one of the Psalms)

G5204.strongs_def: water (as if rainy) literally or figuratively

G5238.derivation: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and the neuter plural of G1565 (ἐκεῖνος);
G5238.strongs_def: above those parts, i.e. still farther

G5256.strongs_def: to be a subordinate, i.e. (by implication) subserve

G5254.strongs_def: to hold oneself under, i.e. endure with patience

G5225.strongs_def: to begin under (quietly), i.e. come into existence (be present or at hand); expletively, to exist (as copula or subordinate to an adjective, participle, adverb or preposition, or as an auxiliary to a principal (verb)

G5288.strongs_def: to withhold under (out of sight), i.e. (reflexively) to cower or shrink, (figuratively) to conceal (reserve)

G5290.strongs_def: to turn under (behind), i.e. to return (literally or figuratively)
G5290.kjv_def: come again, return (again, back again), turn back (again)

G5220.strongs_def: in subjection under a man, i.e. a married woman

G5295.derivation: from G5259 (ὑπό) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate);
G5295.strongs_def: to run under, i.e. (specially), to sail past

G5258.derivation: from an obsolete primary (perhaps akin to G5259 (ὑπό) through the idea of subsilience);

G5222.strongs_def: an encounter or concurrence (with G1519 (εἰς) for infinitive, in order to fall in with)

G5262.strongs_def: an exhibit for imitation or warning (figuratively, specimen, adumbration)

G5218.strongs_def: attentive hearkening, i.e. (by implication) compliance or submission

G5278.strongs_def: to stay under (behind), i.e. remain; figuratively, to undergo, i.e. bear (trials), have fortitude, persevere
G5278.kjv_def: abide, endure, (take) patient(-ly), suffer, tarry behind

G5299.derivation: from a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι);
G5299.strongs_def: to hit under the eye (buffet or disable an antagonist as a pugilist), i.e. (figuratively) to tease or annoy (into compliance), subdue (one's passions)

G5219.strongs_def: to hear under (as a subordinate), i.e. to listen attentively; by implication, to heed or conform to a command or authority

G5269.strongs_def: to gird under, i.e. frap (a vessel with cables across the keel, sides and deck)

G5217.strongs_def: to lead (oneself) under, i.e. withdraw or retire (as if sinking out of sight), literally or figuratively

G5271.derivation: middle voice from G5259 (ὑπό) and G2919 (κρίνω);
G5271.strongs_def: to decide (speak or act) under a false part, i.e. (figuratively) dissemble (pretend)

G5263.strongs_def: to exhibit under the eyes, i.e. (figuratively) to exemplify (instruct, admonish)

G5224.derivation: neuter plural of present participle active of G5225 (ὑπάρχω) as noun;
G5224.strongs_def: things extant or in hand, i.e. property or possessions
G5224.kjv_def: goods, that which one has, things which (one) possesseth, substance, that hast

G5214.strongs_def: to hymn, i.e. sing a religious ode; by implication, to celebrate (God) in song

G5296.derivation: from a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and a derivative of G5179 (τύπος);
G5296.strongs_def: typification under (after), i.e. (concretely) a sketch (figuratively) for imitation

G5298.strongs_def: to vacate down, i.e. retire quietly

G5274.strongs_def: to take from below, i.e. carry upward; figuratively, to take up, i.e. continue a discourse or topic; mentally, to assume (presume)

G5206.derivation: from a presumed compound of G5207 (υἱός) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);
G5206.strongs_def: the placing as a son, i.e. adoption (figuratively, Christian sonship in respect to God)

G5209.strongs_def: you (as the objective of a verb or preposition)

G5233.derivation: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and the base of G939 (βάσις);

G5242.strongs_def: to hold oneself above, i.e. (figuratively) to excel; participle (as adjective, or neuter as noun) superior, superiority

G5286.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G4228 (πούς);
G5286.strongs_def: something under the feet, i.e. a foot-rest (figuratively)

G5227.strongs_def: under (covertly) contrary to, i.e. opposed or (as noun) an opponent

G5268.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G2218 (ζυγός);
G5268.strongs_def: an animal under the yoke (draught-beast), i.e. (specially), a donkey

G5207.strongs_def: a "son" (sometimes of animals), used very widely of immediate, remote or figuratively, kinship

G5291.strongs_def: to strew underneath (the feet as a carpet)

G5235.strongs_def: to throw beyod the usual mark, i.e. (figuratively) to surpass (only active participle supereminent)

G5284.strongs_def: to sail under the lee of

G5265.strongs_def: to bind under one's feet, i.e. put on shoes or sandals

G5257.derivation: from G5259 (ὑπό) and a derivative of (to row);
G5257.strongs_def: an under-oarsman, i.e. (generally) subordinate (assistant, sexton, constable)

G5273.strongs_def: an actor under an assumed character (stage-player), i.e. (figuratively) a dissembler ("hypocrite"

G5276.derivation: neuter of a presumed compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G3025 (ληνός);
G5276.strongs_def: vessel or receptacle under the press, i.e. lower wine-vat

G5203.derivation: from a compound of G5204 (ὕδωρ) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (as if looking watery);

G5236.strongs_def: a throwing beyond others, i.e. (figuratively) supereminence; adverbially (with G1519 (εἰς) or G2596 (κατά)) pre- eminently
G5236.kjv_def: abundance, (far more) exceeding, excellency, more excellent, beyond (out of) measure

G5247.strongs_def: prominence, i.e. (figuratively) superiority (in rank or character)

G5201.strongs_def: a water-jar, i.e. receptacle for family supply

G5266.strongs_def: something bound under the feet, i.e. a shoe or sandal

G5287.derivation: from a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G2476 (ἵστημι);
G5287.strongs_def: a setting under (support), i.e. (figuratively) concretely, essence, or abstractly, assurance (objectively or subjectively)

G5272.strongs_def: acting under a feigned part, i.e. (figuratively) deceit ("hypocrisy")

G5245.strongs_def: to vanquish beyond, i.e. gain a decisive victory

G5253.derivation: neuter of a derivative of G5228 (ὑπέρ);
G5253.strongs_def: a higher part of the house, i.e. apartment in the third story

G5231.strongs_def: above upward, i.e. greatly higher (in place or rank)

G5234.derivation: adverb from present participle active of G5235 (ὑπερβάλλω);

G5252.strongs_def: to esteem oneself overmuch, i.e. be vain or arrogant

G5275.strongs_def: to leave under (behind), i.e. (passively) to remain (survive)

G5228.strongs_def: "over", i.e. (with the genitive case) of place, above, beyond, across, or causal, for the sake of, instead, regarding; with the accusative case superior to, more than
G5228.kjv_def: (+ exceeding, abundantly) above, in (on) behalf of, beyond, by, + very chiefest, concerning, exceeding (above, -ly), for, + very highly, more (than), of, over, on the part of, for sake of, in stead, than, to(-ward), very
G5228.usage: for(104x), of(12x), above(12x), than(2x), beyond(1x), to(1x), over(1x), more(1x)

G5221.derivation: from G5259 (ὑπό) and a derivative of G473 (ἀντί);
G5221.strongs_def: to go opposite (meet) under (quietly), i.e. to encounter, fall in with

G5264.strongs_def: to admit under one's roof, i.e. entertain hospitably

G5293.kjv_def: be under obedience (obedient), put under, subdue unto, (be, make) subject (to, unto), be (put) in subjection (to, under), submit self unto

G5294.strongs_def: to place underneath, i.e. (figuratively) to hazard, (reflexively) to suggest

G5297.strongs_def: to bear from underneath, i.e. (figuratively) to undergo hardship

G5251.strongs_def: to elevate above others, i.e. raise to the highest position

G5261.derivation: from a compound of G5259 (ὑπό) and G1125 (γράφω);
G5261.strongs_def: an underwriting, i.e. copy for imitation (figuratively)

G5259.strongs_def: under, i.e. (with the genitive case) of place (beneath), or with verbs (the agency or means, through); (with the accusative case) of place (whither (underneath) or where (below) or time (when (at))
G5259.kjv_def: among, by, from, in, of, under, with

G5282.strongs_def: to think under (privately), i.e. to surmise or conjecture

G5260.strongs_def: to throw in stealthily, i.e. introduce by collusion

G5200.strongs_def: wet (as if with rain), i.e. (by implication) sappy (fresh)

G5230.derivation: from G5228 (ὑπέρ) and the base of G188 (ἀκμήν);
G5230.strongs_def: beyond the "acme", i.e. figuratively (of a daughter) past the bloom (prime) of youth

G5223.strongs_def: existency or proprietorship, i.e. (concretely) property, wealth
